sections.paragraph:
Original: יעף

Transliteration: yâ‛aph

Phonetic: yaw-af'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be or grow weary, be fatigued, be faint
    1. (Qal) to be or grow weary, be fatigued, be faint
    2. (Hophal) wearied (participle)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 885

Part(s) of speech: Verb
